languages.text: Под огромным герметичным куполом из укрепленного кристалфлекса расположены фильтрационные алтари, очищающие воду и воздух и обогащающие их полезными для колонистов веществами.

traits.locale_text: Под огромным герметичным куполом из укрепленного плекс-стекла расположены фильтр-алтари, очищающие воду и воздух и обогащающие их полезными для колонистов веществами.
Под огромным герметичным куполом из укрепленного кристалфлекса расположены фильтрационные алтари, очищающие воду и воздух и обогащающие их полезными для колонистов веществами.

languages.text: Purifying altars are set up under enormous airtight crystalflex domes, which purify the water and air and enrich them with beneficial substances for the colonists.
languages.original_text: Под огромным герметичным куполом из укрепленного кристалфлекса расположены фильтрационные алтари, очищающие воду и воздух и обогащающие их полезными для колонистов веществами.

traits.locale_text: Purifying altars are set up under these enormous crystalflex domes. Here the colonists can breathe air and drink water that not simply clean, but enriched with beneficial substances.
Purifying altars are set up under these enormous crystalflex domes. Here the colonists can breathe air and drink water that not simply clean, but enriched with beneficial substances.
Purifying altars are set up under enormous airtight crystalflex domes, which purify the water and air and enrich them with beneficial substances for the colonists.

Purifying altars are set up under enormous airtight crystalflex domes, which purify the water and air and enrich them with beneficial substances for the colonists.
Purifying altars are set up under enormous airtight crystalflex domes, which purify the water and air and enrich them with beneficial substances for the colonists.

languages.text: Unter riesigen luftdichten Kristallflex-Kuppeln werden Reinigungsaltäre errichtet, die das Wasser und die Luft reinigen und mit nützlichen Substanzen für die Kolonisten anreichern.
languages.original_text: Purifying altars are set up under enormous airtight crystalflex domes, which purify the water and air and enrich them with beneficial substances for the colonists.

traits.locale_text: Unter riesigen luftdichten Kristallflex-Kuppeln werden Reinigungsaltäre errichtet, die das Wasser und die Luft reinigen und mit nützlichen Substanzen für die Kolonisten anreichern.

languages.text: Des autels purificateurs sont installés sous d'énormes dômes crystalflex étanches, qui purifient l'eau et l'air et les enrichissent de substances bénéfiques pour les colons.
languages.original_text: Purifying altars are set up under enormous airtight crystalflex domes, which purify the water and air and enrich them with beneficial substances for the colonists.

traits.locale_text: Des autels purificateurs sont installés sous d'énormes dômes crystalflex étanches, qui purifient l'eau et l'air et les enrichissent de substances bénéfiques pour les colons.

languages.text: Bajo enormes cúpulas herméticas de cristalflex se instalan altares purificadores que purifican el agua y el aire y los enriquecen con sustancias beneficiosas para los colonos.
languages.original_text: Purifying altars are set up under enormous airtight crystalflex domes, which purify the water and air and enrich them with beneficial substances for the colonists.

traits.locale_text: Bajo enormes cúpulas herméticas de cristalflex se instalan altares purificadores que purifican el agua y el aire y los enriquecen con sustancias beneficiosas para los colonos.

languages.text: Arındırma sunakları, suyu ve havayı arındıran ve kolonistler için faydalı maddelerle zenginleştiren devasa hava geçirmez kristalfleks kubbelerin altında kurulmuştur.
languages.original_text: Purifying altars are set up under enormous airtight crystalflex domes, which purify the water and air and enrich them with beneficial substances for the colonists.

traits.locale_text: Arındırma sunakları, suyu ve havayı arındıran ve kolonistler için faydalı maddelerle zenginleştiren devasa hava geçirmez kristalfleks kubbelerin altında kurulmuştur.
